title: alangium lamarckii var. glandulosum
intro: Alangium lamarckii var. glandulosum is a variety of flowering plant in the family Cornaceae, native to tropical Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help alleviate various health issues such as fever, cough, and skin infections. The health benefits of Alangium lamarckii var. glandulosum include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Alangium lamarckii var. glandulosum can be prepared into herbal remedies such as decoctions, infusions, and poultices, allowing for various applications in treating different health conditions.
